allow: Bash(systemctl --user restart fairprice && systemctl --user status fairprice --no-pager)

Bash(systemctl --user restart fairprice && sleep 2 && systemctl --user status fairprice --no-pager | head -4)

Bash(systemctl --user cat fairprice | grep -i anthropic; echo "---"; grep -r "ANTHROPIC" /home/idarfan/fairprice/.env* 2>/dev/null || echo "\(no .env file\)"; printenv ANTHROPIC_API_KEY | cut -c1-8 && echo "...\(已遮蔽\)" || echo "\(未設定\)")
Bash(bundle exec ruby -e "require 'zest-ui'; puts Gem.find_files\('zui/tab*'\)" 2>/dev/null || find ~/.rbenv/versions -path "*zest*" -name "*.rb" 2>/dev/null | grep -i tab | head -5)
Bash(find ~/.rbenv -name "*.rb" 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l "tab_panel\\|TabPanel" 2>/dev/null | grep -i zest | head -5)

Bash(bundle exec rails runner "
result = YahooFinanceService.new.chart\('ES=F', range: '1d', interval: '1d'\)
puts 'ES=F result: ' + result.inspect
result2 = YahooFinanceService.new.chart\('NQ=F', range: '1d', interval: '1d'\)
puts 'NQ=F result: ' + result2.inspect
" 2>&1)

Bash(bundle exec rails runner "
require 'httparty'
res = HTTParty.get\(
  'https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/ES=F',
  query: { interval: '1d', range: '1d' },
  headers: { 'User-Agent' => 'Mozilla/5.0' },
  timeout: 10
\)
meta = res.parsed_response.dig\('chart', 'result', 0, 'meta'\) || {}
puts meta.keys.inspect
puts 'regularMarketChangePercent: ' + meta['regularMarketChangePercent'].inspect
puts 'regularMarketPrice: ' + meta['regularMarketPrice'].inspect
puts 'chartPreviousClose: ' + meta['chartPreviousClose'].inspect
puts 'previousClose: ' + meta['previousClose'].inspect
" 2>&1)

Bash(bundle exec rails runner "
es = YahooFinanceService.new.chart\('ES=F', range: '1d', interval: '1d'\)
nq = YahooFinanceService.new.chart\('NQ=F', range: '1d', interval: '1d'\)
puts \\"ES change_pct: #{es[:change_pct]}\\"
puts \\"NQ change_pct: #{nq[:change_pct]}\\"
" 2>&1)
Bash(bundle exec rails runner "puts 'Boot OK'" 2>&1 && systemctl --user restart fairprice && sleep 2 && systemctl --user status fairprice --no-pager | head -4)
Bash(bundle exec rails runner "puts Portfolio.count; Portfolio.all.each { |p| puts p.inspect }" 2>&1)
Bash(systemctl --user restart fairprice && sleep 2 && systemctl --user status fairprice --no-pager | tail -5)
Bash(systemctl --user restart fairprice && sleep 2 && systemctl --user status fairprice --no-pager | tail -3)
Bash(systemctl --user restart fairprice && systemctl --user status fairprice --no-pager 2>&1 | head -10)
Bash(systemctl --user restart fairprice && sleep 3 && systemctl --user status fairprice --no-pager -l)
Bash(systemctl --user restart fairprice && sleep 3 && bundle exec rails runner "Rails.cache.clear; puts 'Cache cleared'" && systemctl --user status fairprice --no-pager | grep "Active:")
